# LAS BIALA'S

> Boutique adults-only cottages with private jacuzzi and Finnish sauna in the heart of the Notecka Forest, Poland.

## Summary

- [Homepage](https://lasbialas.pl/): Main website and direct booking.
- [English Website](https://lasbialas.pl/en/): English version.
- [German Website](https://lasbialas.pl/de/): German version.
- [Guest Guide](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/): Information for guests before arrival and during stay.

## Accommodation

- [Cottages Overview](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/before-arrival): Overview of the two cottages.
- [Cottage Equipment](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/before-arrival): Amenities and equipment.
- [Adults Only Policy](https://lasbialas.pl/en/): Adults-only (18+) accommodation concept.
- [House Rules](https://lasbialas.pl/en/terms-and-conditions): Property regulations and stay conditions.

## Wellness

- [Private Jacuzzi](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1026): Private jacuzzi available with every cottage.
- [Finnish Sauna](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1049): Sauna facilities.
- [Cooling Tub](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1063): Cold-water recovery area.

## Activities

- [Trekking Bicycles](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1074): Bicycles available for guests.
- [SUP Boards](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1077): Paddleboarding equipment.
- [Forest Walks](https://lasbialas.pl/blog/przewodnik-po-wydmach/): Hiking and walking inspiration.
- [Nature Activities](https://lasbialas.pl/blog/splyw-rzeka-drawa/): Outdoor recreation ideas.

## Local Area

- [Nearby Attractions](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1119): Recommended places to visit.
- [Restaurants and Local Food](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1121): Dining recommendations.
- [Biała Village](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/on-site/1115): Local information.

## Booking

- [Direct Booking](https://lasbialas.pl/): Reserve directly with the property.
- [Availability Calendar](https://lasbialas.pl/): Check available dates.
- [Pricing](https://lasbialas.pl/): Current rates and offers.

## Guest Information

- [Guest Guide PL](https://lasbialas.pl/info): Polish guide.
- [Guest Guide EN](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/): English guide.
- [Guest Guide DE](https://lasbialas.pl/info/de/): German guide.
- [Arrival Information](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/before-arrival): Arrival instructions.
- [Directions](https://lasbialas.pl/info/en/#/before-arrival/1038): How to reach the property.

## Blog

- [LAS BIALA'S Blog](https://lasbialas.pl/blog): Articles about the Notecka Forest, nature and local attractions.

## Contact

- [Website](https://lasbialas.pl/): Official website.
- [Email](mailto:domki@lasbialas.pl): Contact email.
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/48660194187): Direct contact via WhatsApp.

## Additional Resources

- [Photo Gallery](https://lasbialas.pl/): Property photos.
- [Special Offers](https://lasbialas.pl/): Seasonal promotions.
